creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: lwhsu
Date: Wed Apr 23 06:19:29 2014
New Revision: 351913
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/351913
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r351913/

Log:
  - Stage
  - Drop easy_install
  - Pet portlint
  
  PR:		ports/188881
  Submitted by:	Bartek Rutkowski <ports@robakdesign.com>

Modified:
  head/ftp/py-ftputil/Makefile
  head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-descr
  head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-plist

Modified: head/ftp/py-ftputil/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/ftp/py-ftputil/Makefile	Wed Apr 23 04:40:06 2014	(r351912)
+++ head/ftp/py-ftputil/Makefile	Wed Apr 23 06:19:29 2014	(r351913)
@@ -18,7 +18,6 @@ DOCSDIR=	${PREFIX}/share/doc/py-${PORTNA
 PORTDOC_FILES=	README.html README.txt ftputil.html ftputil.txt ftputil_ru_utf8.txt
 .endif
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
 .include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
 
 do-fetch:
@@ -28,9 +27,9 @@ do-fetch:
 
 post-install:
 .if !defined(NOPORTDOCS)
-	${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .for i in ${PORTDOC_FILES}
-	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/${i} ${STAGEDIR}${DOCSDIR}
 .endfor
 .endif
 

Modified: head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-descr	Wed Apr 23 04:40:06 2014	(r351912)
+++ head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-descr	Wed Apr 23 06:19:29 2014	(r351913)
@@ -6,4 +6,4 @@ functions similar to those in the os, os
 convenience functions for conditional uploads and downloads, and handles FTP
 clients and servers in different timezones.
 
-WWW:	http://ftputil.sschwarzer.net/
+WWW: http://ftputil.sschwarzer.net/

Modified: head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-plist	Wed Apr 23 04:40:06 2014	(r351912)
+++ head/ftp/py-ftputil/pkg-plist	Wed Apr 23 06:19:29 2014	(r351913)
@@ -1,3 +1,6 @@
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/ftputil/setup.py
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/ftputil/setup.pyc
+%%PYTHON_LIBDIR%%/site-packages/ftputil/setup.pyo
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ftputil/__init__.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ftputil/__init__.pyc
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/ftputil/__init__.pyo
